reviews.comment:
Una de los expendios de combustibles en lugar estratégico.  A veces hay q esperar para cargar combustible.
El drugstore no me gustó mucho.  Aire acondicionado viejo, se pasa calor y mala señal de internet

(Translated by Google)
One of the fuel outlets in a strategic location. Sometimes you have to wait to fill up.
I didn't like the drugstore very much. The air conditioning is old, it's hot, and the internet connection is poor.

reviews.comment:
No tienen sistema para hacer fact. A sólo con el número, hay darle todos los datos, prehistórico el sistema. Atención Exelente

(Translated by Google)
They don't have a system for issuing invoices. You have to provide all the information with just the number; the system is prehistoric. Excellent service.
